supporting_evidence.snippet:
Why We Invested in AnyFormat
At Decelera, we look for teams that combine technical mastery with strategic clarity. Juan, Diego, and Alejandro have worked at the frontier of AI and data infrastructure, most notably at Clarity AI, one of the fastest-scaling impact-tech companies in Europe. They know what it takes to build robust, enterprise-ready AI products.
But beyond their credentials, they have built a platform that solves a real pain point for modern businesses, and does so with precision, speed, and empathy for the end user.
Juan: The Scientist Who Sees the System [...] Alejandro: The Strategic Operator
Alejandro Fernández brings structure and momentum. With experience across EY, PwC, and Clarity AI, he drives operations with the precision of an engineer and the insight of a strategist. At AnyFormat, he makes sure the solution doesn’t just work, but fits perfectly into clients’ most critical workflows. [...] Juan Huguet, CEO & Co-founder of Anyformat at #DeceleraMenorca2025
The Challenge: Unstructured Data Is Everywhere
Modern organizations spend millions trying to extract and standardize data buried in scattered formats. Legacy systems break down, manual processes are slow and error-prone, and scalability remains a dream.
AnyFormat changes the game. With seamless integrations, enterprise-grade security, and rapid workflow configuration, it enables teams to extract, validate, and export structured data at scale, without writing a single line of code.
Why We Invested in AnyFormat
supporting_evidence.raw_content:
Saltar al contenido 
Decelera
Contact
Decelera
Contact
Why We Invested in AnyFormat – Turning Data Chaos into Clarity
Escrito por Marina Bestué
At Decelera Ventures, we back founders who tackle deep, structural inefficiencies with bold vision and elegant execution. AnyFormat does exactly that, turning the overwhelming chaos of unstructured data into clean, actionable insight.
From insurance to banking, companies today are drowning in PDFs, images, emails, and audio files filled with valuable information, but trapped in formats machines can’t understand. AnyFormat unlocks that data with a GenAI platform that delivers over 99% accuracy, reduces costs by more than 90%, and requires zero technical expertise to implement.

Juan Huguet, CEO & Co-founder of Anyformat at #DeceleraMenorca2025
The Challenge: Unstructured Data Is Everywhere
Modern organizations spend millions trying to extract and standardize data buried in scattered formats. Legacy systems break down, manual processes are slow and error-prone, and scalability remains a dream.
AnyFormat changes the game. With seamless integrations, enterprise-grade security, and rapid workflow configuration, it enables teams to extract, validate, and export structured data at scale, without writing a single line of code.
Why We Invested in AnyFormat
At Decelera, we look for teams that combine technical mastery with strategic clarity. Juan, Diego, and Alejandro have worked at the frontier of AI and data infrastructure, most notably at Clarity AI, one of the fastest-scaling impact-tech companies in Europe. They know what it takes to build robust, enterprise-ready AI products.
But beyond their credentials, they have built a platform that solves a real pain point for modern businesses, and does so with precision, speed, and empathy for the end user.
Juan: The Scientist Who Sees the System
With a PhD in Physics and a deep background in machine learning, Juan Huguet doesn’t just lead, he architects intelligence. At IBM and Clarity AI, he led complex AI projects; now, as CEO of AnyFormat, he channels that experience into creating infrastructure that scales effortlessly while adapting to real-world use cases.
Diego: The Quiet Power Behind the Platform
As CTO, Diego Pérez builds what others call impossible. With a strong foundation in AI and MLOps, he ensures that AnyFormat’s core engine is both technically elegant and deeply reliable. Whether it’s designing robust model pipelines or architecting seamless scalability, Diego makes sure the engine runs with zero compromise.
Alejandro: The Strategic Operator
Alejandro Fernández brings structure and momentum. With experience across EY, PwC, and Clarity AI, he drives operations with the precision of an engineer and the insight of a strategist. At AnyFormat, he makes sure the solution doesn’t just work, but fits perfectly into clients’ most critical workflows.

Diego Pérez, Juan Huguet & Alejandro Fernández, founders of Anyformat 2024
Building the Future of Data
We believe AnyFormat is building foundational infrastructure for the GenAI era. In a world where data complexity grows exponentially, they are offering clarity, speed, and control. They aren’t just transforming how businesses extract data, they’re shaping how organizations make decisions.
At Decelera, we support founders who solve hard problems with lasting impact. That’s exactly what AnyFormat is doing. And we’re proud to back them.If you’re a founder looking to scale with purpose, apply for our next program and be part of a community that helps you grow beyond the grind.
Marina Bestué

Getting Started
Welcome to anyformat
Learn how to turn documents into reliable, structured data, without building fragile pipelines.
anyformat helps you extract, validate, and transform data from any document using AI-powered workflows. This documentation will guide you step by step, from your first file to advanced workflows and automation. Whether you’re here to:
 Process invoices or IDs
 Build reliable document workflows
 Improve accuracy
 Or just understand how anyformat works [...] anyformat is a document processing platform that lets you:
 Upload documents (PDFs, images, scans)
 Extract structured data using AI
 Validate and refine results
 Output clean data you can actually use
You don’t need to be technical. You don’t need to write code. You do need documents and a problem to solve. 
​ What can I do with anyformat?
With anyformat, you can:
 Extract data from invoices, receipts, IDs, contracts, and more
 Handle unstructured or messy documents
 Standardize data across different formats
 Build repeatable workflows for document processing
 Validate and improve quality over time
 Export structured data to your systems
All without managing OCR engines, brittle rules, or manual review processes. 
​ How anyformat works
At a simple level, anyformat works like this:
1 [...] At a simple level, anyformat works like this:
1
Upload a file
anyformat reads the document and understands its structure.
2
Define what you want
You describe the data you need using fields and instructions.
3
Refine & validate
Review results, fix mistakes, and improve accuracy.
4
Run at scale
Apply the same logic to thousands of documents.
5
Use the output
Export clean, structured data in formats your tools understand.
You can keep things simple, or go deeper as your needs grow. 
​ Key concepts you’ll learn here
Before diving in, it helps to understand a few core ideas:
 Files - The documents you upload
 Schemas - The structure of the data you want
 Fields - Individual pieces of information (date, amount, name…)
 Workflows - Repeatable processes to extract and validate data

Getting Started
Welcome to anyformat
Learn how to turn documents into reliable, structured data, without building fragile pipelines.
anyformat helps you extract, validate, and transform data from any document using AI-powered workflows. This documentation will guide you step by step, from your first file to advanced workflows and automation. Whether you’re here to:
 Process invoices or IDs
 Build reliable document workflows
 Improve accuracy
 Or just understand how anyformat works
you’re in the right place. 
​ Get started quickly
Choose how you want to begin. You don’t need to read everything.
Files & Documents
Start here if you want to upload a document and see results fast.Learn how files work, how pages are handled, and how usage is counted.
Workflow Quickstart
Best starting point for most users.Learn how to create a workflow, define fields, and extract structured data.
Data & Structure
Understand the building blocks.Learn how to define schemas, fields, and instructions for your workflows.
API Quickstart
For developers and technical teams.Learn how to integrate anyformat programmatically.
​ What is anyformat?
anyformat is a document processing platform that lets you:
 Upload documents (PDFs, images, scans)
 Extract structured data using AI
 Validate and refine results
 Output clean data you can actually use
You don’t need to be technical. You don’t need to write code. You do need documents and a problem to solve. 
​ What can I do with anyformat?
With anyformat, you can:
 Extract data from invoices, receipts, IDs, contracts, and more
 Handle unstructured or messy documents
 Standardize data across different formats
 Build repeatable workflows for document processing
 Validate and improve quality over time
 Export structured data to your systems
All without managing OCR engines, brittle rules, or manual review processes. 
​ How anyformat works
At a simple level, anyformat works like this:
1
Upload a file
anyformat reads the document and understands its structure.
2
Define what you want
You describe the data you need using fields and instructions.
3
Refine & validate
Review results, fix mistakes, and improve accuracy.
4
Run at scale
Apply the same logic to thousands of documents.
5
Use the output
Export clean, structured data in formats your tools understand.
You can keep things simple, or go deeper as your needs grow. 
​ Key concepts you’ll learn here
Before diving in, it helps to understand a few core ideas:
 Files - The documents you upload
 Schemas - The structure of the data you want
 Fields - Individual pieces of information (date, amount, name…)
 Workflows - Repeatable processes to extract and validate data
 Outputs - The structured results you use elsewhere
Don’t worry, we’ll explain each one step by step. 
​ How to use this documentation
This documentation is designed as a learning path:
 New to anyformat? Start with Core Concepts.
 Already using the product? Jump directly to Workflows.
 Looking for power features? Check out the advanced sections.
You don’t need to read everything, just what helps you move forward. 
​ Explore more

Madrid-based Anyformat raises €520k to simplify the automation of unstructured data extraction
Stefano De Marzo

Anyformat, a Spanish startup betting on a new era of collaboration between people and artificial intelligence, has announced the raising of €520k in a pre-seed financing round. This round, led by 4Founders Capital, Abac Nest Ventures, and prominent business angels, will allow anyformat to accelerate the development of its generative artificial intelligence platform, designed to transform the way companies manage and analyze unstructured data.
With this injection of capital, anyformat is consolidating itself as a key solution to automate the extraction and analysis of complex data, enabling any user – without the need for technical knowledge – to convert large volumes of unstructured information into strategic insights. This marks a crucial step for organizations looking to optimize processes and improve data-driven decision making.
According to the Data Cube report “Spain Artificial Intelligence Market Growth and Performance”, the artificial intelligence market in Spain is expected to reach $26.56 billion by 2032, with a compound annual growth rate of 27.4%. This growth environment, combined with the exponential increase in the generation of unstructured data, reinforces the strategic relevance of anyformat for companies seeking operational agility and efficiency.
Juan Huguet, CEO of anyformat, said: “Our mission is clear: to enable organizations to adopt hybrid intelligence by allowing AI to do the heavy lifting of extracting and structuring data, and getting people to focus on solving strategic and creative problems. With anyformat, companies access valuable information quickly and without complications.”
The anyformat platform automates the extraction of information contained in documents, presentations or even voice recordings, simplifying what previously required a lot of manual work or advanced technical knowledge. In the words of Alejandro Fernández, COO of anyformat, “Many companies are held back by the difficulty of managing unstructured data. With our solution, we make that information immediately available to teams, ready to be integrated into tools such as Excel or business intelligence platforms.”
In addition to its focus on usability, anyformat is designed to scale easily, ensuring simple integration with existing systems. Diego Pérez, CTO of anyformat, added: “Our priority is to optimize workflows without compromising data security or privacy. We know that trust is key, and we ensure that information is handled responsibly and efficiently, allowing organizations to grow sustainably.”
Investors recognize anyformat’s disruptive potential. Joan Pina, partner at Abac Nest Ventures, commented: “At Abac Nest Ventures we have bet on anyformat because we believe in the vision of its founders and in the impact that its technology can have on the industry. Turning unstructured data into actionable knowledge is a growing need, and companies using anyformat are gaining competitiveness by quickly and efficiently integrating AI into their processes.”
With the new funding, anyformat is preparing to expand its team and operations, with an eye toward consolidating its presence in Spain and exploring opportunities in international markets. “At anyformat, we are committed to transforming unstructured information into a competitive advantage, allowing companies to not only access valuable information, but to use it intelligently to make strategic decisions that drive their growth and success,” concluded Juan Huguet.
Stefano De Marzo

Anyformat Secures €3.3M to Scale Document Intelligence

By Ekaterina Pisareva
November 27, 2025
Anyformat team
Credits: Anyformat official website
Spanish AI startup Anyformat has closed a €3.3 million seed round to accelerate the development of its document intelligence platform. The funding was led by Kibo Ventures, with continued support from 4Founders, Abac Nest Ventures, and Decelera Ventures, all of which participated in the company's previous round.
The Madrid-based company has built a generative AI platform that extracts and structures complex data from virtually any document type. Its technology enables large organizations to process contracts, invoices, emails, and presentations with what the company describes as human-level accuracy at machine speed, while keeping sensitive data under full organizational control.
A New Approach to Document Intelligence
What sets Anyformat apart is its ability to combine extracted document information with a company's existing proprietary data in real time. This means businesses can automate the analysis of unstructured documents while simultaneously cross-referencing them against internal records like customer databases, policies, product catalogs, or historical information.
For organizations juggling complex documentation across fragmented systems, this capability eliminates manual validation steps, reduces errors, and speeds up business-critical processes. The opportunity is significant: according to Dell Technologies' Innovation Catalyst report, 68% of Spanish companies are unable to turn their data into valuable, real-time insights.
"The document intelligence market is entering a new phase driven by generative AI and agentic systems. Anyformat has developed a unique technology that enables companies to automate critical processes while preserving data sovereignty, an essential requirement in Europe. The founders' vision and talent, combined with the vast potential of AI in a large and growing market, were key factors in our decision to invest," says Javier Torremocha, Co-founder and Managing Partner at Kibo Ventures.
Expanding Capabilities and European Reach
The fresh capital will fuel product development and grow the company's engineering and product teams. Priorities include strengthening advanced extraction capabilities and building proprietary error-detection models. Anyformat also plans to establish a dedicated sales team focused on Spain and the broader European Union market.
The company will continue investing in its privacy-first infrastructure and is working toward ISO 27001 certification, a requirement for many large corporations and public institutions.
Anyformat forecasts surpassing €1 million in annual recurring revenue in 2026, driven by European expansion and growing demand for automation, compliance tools, and advanced document processing solutions.
From Startup to Enterprise Partner
Founded by CEO Juan Huguet and CTO Diego Pérez, Anyformat has already secured projects with the Singapore Government, L'Oréal Group, and IAG Group. These partnerships demonstrate the platform's ability to operate in complex, high-demand environments.
"Documents are the backbone of any organization. Our goal is to help companies analyze them with human intelligence, machine speed, and the level of security required by modern regulations," says Huguet. Pérez adds: "We are building technology that goes far beyond simple document digitization."
Since raising €520,000 in June 2025, the company has significantly expanded its capabilities beyond traditional document extraction. It now positions itself as the only provider capable of real-time integration between extracted document data and enterprise systems.
Investors Back Long-Term Vision
The seed round brings together a strong syndicate of Spanish and European investors. Kibo Ventures led the round, while 4Founders, Abac Nest Ventures, and Decelera Ventures all doubled down on their earlier investments. The continued backing from all previous investors signals confidence in Anyformat's trajectory and market positioning.
The company continues refining its technology to convert any file into structured data for analytics, business intelligence, and operational workflows, always maintaining strict privacy and security standards.

supporting_evidence.title: Madrid's Anyformat closes €3.3 million round to scale its ...
supporting_evidence.snippet:
Image 9: Anyformat
Anyformat, a Spanish GenAI platform specialising in extracting and structuring complex data from any document, has closed a Seed round of €3.3 million to expand the engineering and product team, driving its roadmap in advanced extraction capabilities and the development of proprietary error detection models.
The round was led by Kibo Ventures and followed by 4Founders, Abac Nest Ventures and Decelera Ventures, funds that already participated in the previous round.
Juan Huguet, CEO and co-founder of Anyformat, says, “_Documents are the backbone of any organisation. Our goal is to enable companies to analyse them with human intelligence, machine speed and the security required by regulation. We are building the new European document infrastructure.‘_(Translated). [...] In this context, Anyformat’s €3.3 million Seed roundpositions it as one of the few European companies pursuing a horizontal, generative-AI-based document-intelligence layer – particularly notable given the absence of other Spain-based fundraises in the category – adding meaningful weight to the still-emerging European document-automation landscape.
Diego Pérez, co-founder and CTO of the company, adds:_“We are developing technology that goes far beyond document digitisation_.” (Translated)
Founded in 2024, Anyformat is innovating a new generation of document infrastructure based on generative AI, which reportedly allows the operational teams of large corporations to work with complex documents with human precision and machine speed, while maintaining control of the data at all times. [...] This represents a real problem: according to Dell Technologies’ Innovation Catalyst report, 68% of Spanish companies are unable to convert their data into valuable information in real time.
“_The document intelligence market is entering a new phase driven by generative AI and agentic systems. Anyformat has developed a unique technology that allows companies to automate critical processes while maintaining data sovereignty, a key issue in Europe._
_“The vision and talent of the founders, whom we know from their time at Clarity.ai, a company also invested in by Kibo Ventures, combined with the possibilities offered by AI in a huge market, were key factors in our decision to invest_,” shares Javier Torremocha, co-founder and Managing Partner of Kibo Ventures.

HomeFundingMadrid's Anyformat closes €3.3 million round to scale its agentic OCR and...
FundingSpain-Startups
Madrid’s Anyformat closes €3.3 million round to scale its agentic OCR and data-sovereignty-focused document tools
Image 8: David Cendon Garcia
ByDavid Cendon Garcia
November 27, 2025
Share
FacebookTwitterWhatsAppLinkedin

Image 9: Anyformat
Anyformat, a Spanish GenAI platform specialising in extracting and structuring complex data from any document, has closed a Seed round of €3.3 million to expand the engineering and product team, driving its roadmap in advanced extraction capabilities and the development of proprietary error detection models.
The round was led by Kibo Ventures and followed by 4Founders, Abac Nest Ventures and Decelera Ventures, funds that already participated in the previous round.
Juan Huguet, CEO and co-founder of Anyformat, says, “_Documents are the backbone of any organisation. Our goal is to enable companies to analyse them with human intelligence, machine speed and the security required by regulation. We are building the new European document infrastructure.‘_(Translated).
Among European startups working on document processing, data extraction and AI-enabled enterprise automation, 2025 funding activity has been limited but illustrative: France-based Klaimy raised €1.2 million to advance its AI assistant for processing medical documentation, while Prague-headquartered Resistant AI secured €21 million in Series B financing to strengthen its document-fraud detection and financial-crime prevention systems.
Together, these comparable 2025 rounds amount to roughly €22.2 million, indicating that investor attention in this domain remains focused on specialised applications such as insurance, medical underwriting and fraud detection rather than broad, general-purpose document-infrastructure platforms.
In this context, Anyformat’s €3.3 million Seed roundpositions it as one of the few European companies pursuing a horizontal, generative-AI-based document-intelligence layer – particularly notable given the absence of other Spain-based fundraises in the category – adding meaningful weight to the still-emerging European document-automation landscape.
Diego Pérez, co-founder and CTO of the company, adds:_“We are developing technology that goes far beyond document digitisation_.” (Translated)
Founded in 2024, Anyformat is innovating a new generation of document infrastructure based on generative AI, which reportedly allows the operational teams of large corporations to work with complex documents with human precision and machine speed, while maintaining control of the data at all times.
Since its previous round, where it raised €520k in pre-Seed funding (as covered by EU-Startups), Anyformat has expanded its offering beyond classic extraction. Today, the company says they are the only provider that allows the information extracted from a document to be combined in real time with internal and proprietary company data.
This means that a contract, invoice or email can be analysed automatically while being cross-referenced directly with corporate databases, such as customers, policies, catalogues or history.
For organisations with complex documentation and fragmented systems, this capability eliminates manual validations, reduces errors and accelerates critical business processes.
This represents a real problem: according to Dell Technologies’ Innovation Catalyst report, 68% of Spanish companies are unable to convert their data into valuable information in real time.
“_The document intelligence market is entering a new phase driven by generative AI and agentic systems. Anyformat has developed a unique technology that allows companies to automate critical processes while maintaining data sovereignty, a key issue in Europe._
_“The vision and talent of the founders, whom we know from their time at Clarity.ai, a company also invested in by Kibo Ventures, combined with the possibilities offered by AI in a huge market, were key factors in our decision to invest_,” shares Javier Torremocha, co-founder and Managing Partner of Kibo Ventures.
Anyformat aims to exceed €1 million in ARR in 2026, supported by its commercial expansion in Europe and the increase in use cases linked to automation, compliance and advanced document processing.
In addition, the company will continue to invest in its privacy-first infrastructure, strengthening security processes and advancing certifications such as ISO 27001.
The company is positioning its Agentic OCR as the new standard for automating critical processes in organisations that cannot compromise on accuracy or data control.

anyformat Release 0.0.2
Release 0.0.2  0.0.2
The official Python library for the anyformat API
Homepage PyPI Python
License
:   Apache-2.0
Install
:   pip install anyformat==0.0.2
Documentation
Anyformat Python API library
The Anyformat Python library provides convenient access to the Anyformat REST API from any Python 3.9+ application. The library includes type definitions for all request params and response fields, and offers both synchronous and asynchronous clients powered by httpx.
It is generated with Stainless.
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
Installation
# install from PyPI #
Usage
The full API of this library can be found in api.md. [...] Usage
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
import os from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted response = client health check
While you can provide an api_key keyword argument, we recommend using python-dotenv to add ANYFORMAT_API_KEY="My API Key" to your .env file so that your API Key is not stored in source control.
Async usage
Simply import AsyncAnyformat instead of Anyformat and use await with each API call:
import os import asyncio from anyformat import AsyncAnyformat client = AsyncAnyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted async def main -> None response = await client health check asyncio run main [...] 3. Changes that we do not expect to impact the vast majority of users in practice.
We take backwards-compatibility seriously and work hard to ensure you can rely on a smooth upgrade experience.
We are keen for your feedback; please open an issue with questions, bugs, or suggestions.
Determining the installed version
If you've upgraded to the latest version but aren't seeing any new features you were expecting then your python environment is likely still using an older version.
You can determine the version that is being used at runtime with:
import anyformat print anyformat __version__
Python 3.9 or higher.
See the contributing documentation.

anyformat Release 0.0.2
Release 0.0.2  0.0.2
The official Python library for the anyformat API
Homepage PyPI Python
License
:   Apache-2.0
Install
:   pip install anyformat==0.0.2
Documentation
Anyformat Python API library
The Anyformat Python library provides convenient access to the Anyformat REST API from any Python 3.9+ application. The library includes type definitions for all request params and response fields, and offers both synchronous and asynchronous clients powered by httpx.
It is generated with Stainless.
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
Installation
# install from PyPI #
Usage
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
import os from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted response = client health check
While you can provide an api_key keyword argument, we recommend using python-dotenv to add ANYFORMAT_API_KEY="My API Key" to your .env file so that your API Key is not stored in source control.
Async usage
Simply import AsyncAnyformat instead of Anyformat and use await with each API call:
import os import asyncio from anyformat import AsyncAnyformat client = AsyncAnyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted async def main -> None response = await client health check asyncio run main
Functionality between the synchronous and asynchronous clients is otherwise identical.
With aiohttp
By default, the async client uses httpx for HTTP requests. However, for improved concurrency performance you may also use aiohttp as the HTTP backend.
You can enable this by installing aiohttp:
# install from PyPI #
Then you can enable it by instantiating the client with http_client=DefaultAioHttpClient():
import os import asyncio from anyformat import DefaultAioHttpClient from anyformat import AsyncAnyformat async def main -> None async with AsyncAnyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted http_client = DefaultAioHttpClient as client response = await client health check asyncio run main
Using types
Nested request parameters are TypedDicts. Responses are Pydantic models which also provide helper methods for things like:
 Serializing back into JSON, model.to_json()
 Converting to a dictionary, model.to_dict()
Typed requests and responses provide autocomplete and documentation within your editor. If you would like to see type errors in VS Code to help catch bugs earlier, set python.analysis.typeCheckingMode to basic.
Handling errors
When the library is unable to connect to the API (for example, due to network connection problems or a timeout), a subclass of anyformat.APIConnectionError is raised.
When the API returns a non-success status code (that is, 4xx or 5xx response), a subclass of anyformat.APIStatusError is raised, containing status_code and response properties.
All errors inherit from anyformat.APIError.
import anyformat from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat try client health check except anyformat APIConnectionError as e print "The server could not be reached" print e __cause__# an underlying Exception, likely raised within httpx. except anyformat RateLimitError as e print"A 429 status code was received; we should back off a bit." except anyformat APIStatusError as e print"Another non-200-range status code was received" print e status_code print e response
Error codes are as follows:
| Status Code | Error Type |
 --- |
| 400 | BadRequestError |
| 401 | AuthenticationError |
| 403 | PermissionDeniedError |
| 404 | NotFoundError |
| 422 | UnprocessableEntityError |
| 429 | RateLimitError |
| >=500 | InternalServerError |
| N/A | APIConnectionError |
Retries
Certain errors are automatically retried 2 times by default, with a short exponential backoff. Connection errors (for example, due to a network connectivity problem), 408 Request Timeout, 409 Conflict, 429 Rate Limit, and >=500 Internal errors are all retried by default.
You can use the max_retries option to configure or disable retry settings:
from anyformat import Anyformat# Configure the default for all requests: client = Anyformat # default is 2 max_retries = 0# Or, configure per-request: client with_options max_retries = 5 health check
Timeouts
By default requests time out after 1 minute. You can configure this with a timeout option, which accepts a float or an httpx.Timeout object:
from anyformat import Anyformat# Configure the default for all requests: client = Anyformat# 20 seconds (default is 1 minute) timeout =20.0# More granular control: client = Anyformat timeout = httpx Timeout60.0 read =5.0 write =10.0 connect =2.0# Override per-request: client with_options timeout =5.0 health check
On timeout, an APITimeoutError is thrown.
Note that requests that time out are retried twice by default.
Advanced
Logging
We use the standard library logging module.
You can enable logging by setting the environment variable ANYFORMAT_LOG to info.
export
Or to debug for more verbose logging.
How to tell whether None means null or missing
In an API response, a field may be explicitly null, or missing entirely; in either case, its value is None in this library. You can differentiate the two cases with .model_fields_set:
if response my_field is None if 'my_field' not in not in response model_fields_set print'Got json like {}, without a "my_field" key present at all.' else print'Got json like {"my_field": null}.'
Accessing raw response data (e.g. headers)
The "raw" Response object can be accessed by prefixing .with_raw_response. to any HTTP method call, e.g.,
from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat response = client health with_raw_response check print response headers get'X-My-Header' health = response parse# get the object that 
These methods return an [The async client returns an AsyncAPIResponse with the same structure, the only difference being awaitable methods for reading the response content.
.with_streaming_response
The above interface eagerly reads the full response body when you make the request, which may not always be what you want.
To stream the response body, use .with_streaming_response instead, which requires a context manager and only reads the response body once you call .read(), .text(), .json(), .iter_bytes(), .iter_text(), .iter_lines() or .parse(). In the async client, these are async methods.
with client health with_streaming_response check as response print response headers get"X-My-Header" for line in response iter_lines print line
The context manager is required so that the response will reliably be closed.
Making custom/undocumented requests
This library is typed for convenient access to the documented API.
If you need to access undocumented endpoints, params, or response properties, the library can still be used.
Undocumented endpoints
To make requests to undocumented endpoints, you can make requests using client.get, client.post, and other http verbs. Options on the client will be respected (such as retries) when making this request.
import httpx response = client post"/foo" cast_to = httpx Response body = "my_param" True print response headers get"x-foo"
Undocumented request params
If you want to explicitly send an extra param, you can do so with the extra_query, extra_body, and extra_headers request options.
Undocumented response properties
To access undocumented response properties, you can access the extra fields like response.unknown_prop. You can also get all the extra fields on the Pydantic model as a dict with response.model_extra.
Configuring the HTTP client
You can directly override the httpx client to customize it for your use case, including:
 Support for proxies
 Custom transports
 Additional advanced functionality
import httpx from anyformat import Anyformat DefaultHttpxClient client = Anyformat # Or use the 
You can also customize the client on a per-request basis by using client with_options http_client = DefaultHttpxClient
Managing HTTP resources
By default the library closes underlying HTTP connections whenever the client is garbage collected. You can manually close the client using the .close() method if desired, or with a context manager that closes when exiting.
from anyformat import Anyformat with Anyformat as client # make requests here # HTTP client is now closed
Versioning
This package generally follows SemVer conventions, though certain backwards-incompatible changes may be released as minor versions:
1. Changes that only affect static types, without breaking runtime behavior.
2. Changes to library internals which are technically public but not intended or documented for external use. (Please open a GitHub issue to let us know if you are relying on such internals.)
3. Changes that we do not expect to impact the vast majority of users in practice.
We take backwards-compatibility seriously and work hard to ensure you can rely on a smooth upgrade experience.
We are keen for your feedback; please open an issue with questions, bugs, or suggestions.
Determining the installed version
If you've upgraded to the latest version but aren't seeing any new features you were expecting then your python environment is likely still using an older version.
You can determine the version that is being used at runtime with:
import anyformat print anyformat __version__
Python 3.9 or higher.
See the contributing documentation.

Established
2024
Location
Madrid, -, Spain
Primary Industry
Software
About
Established in 2024 and based in Madrid, Spain, Anyformat focuses on document processing technologies. Alejandro Fernandez Rodriguez (COO), Juan Huguet Garcia (CEO), and Diego Perez Sastre (CTO) are the co-founders of the company. In November 2025, Anyformat raised EUR 3. 3 million in seed funding led by new investor Kibo Ventures, with participation from another new investor Decelera Ventures.
Returning investors 4Founders Capital and Abac Capital also participated in the round.
Anyformat specializes in advanced data extraction and structuring solutions, enabling organizations to derive insights from various document formats, including emails, PDFs, scans, reports, and audio recordings. The company’s core offering utilizes proprietary in-house models optimized for specific use cases, allowing for automated extraction of complex and heterogeneous documents without the risk of hallucination. This technology is particularly beneficial for industries requiring the processing of lengthy documents, such as financial services, healthcare, and insurance.
Anyformat serves a diverse client base, including leading companies across multiple sectors, who leverage the service to streamline processes such as data reconciliation, regulatory compliance, and customer relationship management. The products are deployed in private cloud or on-premises environments, ensuring data security and privacy while being utilized in global markets.
The revenue model of Anyformat is centered around B2B transactions, where enterprises engage the company’s services through subscription-based agreements or tailored partnerships.
The company plans to utilize the November 2025 funding to grow its engineering and product teams, which will help advance its roadmap for enhanced extraction features and the creation of unique error detection models.

supporting_evidence.snippet:

GuidesAPI ReferenceChangelog
Getting Started
 Getting Started
Core Concepts
Building with anyformat
 Get started quickly
 What is anyformat?
 What can I do with anyformat?
 How anyformat works

Getting Started
Welcome to anyformat
Learn how to turn documents into reliable, structured data, without building fragile pipelines.
anyformat helps you extract, validate, and transform data from any document using AI-powered workflows. This documentation will guide you step by step, from your first file to advanced workflows and automation. Whether you’re here to:
 Process invoices or IDs
 Build reliable document workflows
 Improve accuracy
 Or just understand how anyformat works [...] anyformat is a document processing platform that lets you:
 Upload documents (PDFs, images, scans)
 Extract structured data using AI
 Validate and refine results
 Output clean data you can actually use
You don’t need to be technical. You don’t need to write code. You do need documents and a problem to solve. 
​ What can I do with anyformat?
With anyformat, you can:
 Extract data from invoices, receipts, IDs, contracts, and more
 Handle unstructured or messy documents
 Standardize data across different formats
 Build repeatable workflows for document processing
 Validate and improve quality over time
 Export structured data to your systems
All without managing OCR engines, brittle rules, or manual review processes. 
​ How anyformat works
At a simple level, anyformat works like this:
1 [...] At a simple level, anyformat works like this:
1
Upload a file
anyformat reads the document and understands its structure.
2
Define what you want
You describe the data you need using fields and instructions.
3
Refine & validate
Review results, fix mistakes, and improve accuracy.
4
Run at scale
Apply the same logic to thousands of documents.
5
Use the output
Export clean, structured data in formats your tools understand.
You can keep things simple, or go deeper as your needs grow. 
​ Key concepts you’ll learn here
Before diving in, it helps to understand a few core ideas:
 Files - The documents you upload
 Schemas - The structure of the data you want
 Fields - Individual pieces of information (date, amount, name…)
 Workflows - Repeatable processes to extract and validate data

Getting Started
Welcome to anyformat
Learn how to turn documents into reliable, structured data, without building fragile pipelines.
anyformat helps you extract, validate, and transform data from any document using AI-powered workflows. This documentation will guide you step by step, from your first file to advanced workflows and automation. Whether you’re here to:
 Process invoices or IDs
 Build reliable document workflows
 Improve accuracy
 Or just understand how anyformat works
you’re in the right place. 
​ Get started quickly
Choose how you want to begin. You don’t need to read everything.
Files & Documents
Start here if you want to upload a document and see results fast.Learn how files work, how pages are handled, and how usage is counted.
Workflow Quickstart
Best starting point for most users.Learn how to create a workflow, define fields, and extract structured data.
Data & Structure
Understand the building blocks.Learn how to define schemas, fields, and instructions for your workflows.
API Quickstart
For developers and technical teams.Learn how to integrate anyformat programmatically.
​ What is anyformat?
anyformat is a document processing platform that lets you:
 Upload documents (PDFs, images, scans)
 Extract structured data using AI
 Validate and refine results
 Output clean data you can actually use
You don’t need to be technical. You don’t need to write code. You do need documents and a problem to solve. 
​ What can I do with anyformat?
With anyformat, you can:
 Extract data from invoices, receipts, IDs, contracts, and more
 Handle unstructured or messy documents
 Standardize data across different formats
 Build repeatable workflows for document processing
 Validate and improve quality over time
 Export structured data to your systems
All without managing OCR engines, brittle rules, or manual review processes. 
​ How anyformat works
At a simple level, anyformat works like this:
1
Upload a file
anyformat reads the document and understands its structure.
2
Define what you want
You describe the data you need using fields and instructions.
3
Refine & validate
Review results, fix mistakes, and improve accuracy.
4
Run at scale
Apply the same logic to thousands of documents.
5
Use the output
Export clean, structured data in formats your tools understand.
You can keep things simple, or go deeper as your needs grow. 
​ Key concepts you’ll learn here
Before diving in, it helps to understand a few core ideas:
 Files - The documents you upload
 Schemas - The structure of the data you want
 Fields - Individual pieces of information (date, amount, name…)
 Workflows - Repeatable processes to extract and validate data
 Outputs - The structured results you use elsewhere
Don’t worry, we’ll explain each one step by step. 
​ How to use this documentation
This documentation is designed as a learning path:
 New to anyformat? Start with Core Concepts.
 Already using the product? Jump directly to Workflows.
 Looking for power features? Check out the advanced sections.
You don’t need to read everything, just what helps you move forward. 
​ Explore more
Core Concepts
Understand the fundamentals of document processing
Outputs
Learn about structured results and export formats
Data and Structure
Define schemas and fields for your workflows

Integrate anyformat into your applications

anyformat Release 0.0.2
Release 0.0.2  0.0.2
The official Python library for the anyformat API
Homepage PyPI Python
License
:   Apache-2.0
Install
:   pip install anyformat==0.0.2
Documentation
Anyformat Python API library
The Anyformat Python library provides convenient access to the Anyformat REST API from any Python 3.9+ application. The library includes type definitions for all request params and response fields, and offers both synchronous and asynchronous clients powered by httpx.
It is generated with Stainless.
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
Installation
# install from PyPI #
Usage
The full API of this library can be found in api.md. [...] Usage
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
import os from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted response = client health check
While you can provide an api_key keyword argument, we recommend using python-dotenv to add ANYFORMAT_API_KEY="My API Key" to your .env file so that your API Key is not stored in source control.
Async usage
Simply import AsyncAnyformat instead of Anyformat and use await with each API call:
import os import asyncio from anyformat import AsyncAnyformat client = AsyncAnyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted async def main -> None response = await client health check asyncio run main [...] 3. Changes that we do not expect to impact the vast majority of users in practice.
We take backwards-compatibility seriously and work hard to ensure you can rely on a smooth upgrade experience.
We are keen for your feedback; please open an issue with questions, bugs, or suggestions.
Determining the installed version
If you've upgraded to the latest version but aren't seeing any new features you were expecting then your python environment is likely still using an older version.
You can determine the version that is being used at runtime with:
import anyformat print anyformat __version__
Python 3.9 or higher.

anyformat Release 0.0.2
Release 0.0.2  0.0.2
The official Python library for the anyformat API
Homepage PyPI Python
License
:   Apache-2.0
Install
:   pip install anyformat==0.0.2
Documentation
Anyformat Python API library
The Anyformat Python library provides convenient access to the Anyformat REST API from any Python 3.9+ application. The library includes type definitions for all request params and response fields, and offers both synchronous and asynchronous clients powered by httpx.
It is generated with Stainless.
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
Installation
# install from PyPI #
Usage
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
import os from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted response = client health check
While you can provide an api_key keyword argument, we recommend using python-dotenv to add ANYFORMAT_API_KEY="My API Key" to your .env file so that your API Key is not stored in source control.
Async usage
Simply import AsyncAnyformat instead of Anyformat and use await with each API call:
import os import asyncio from anyformat import AsyncAnyformat client = AsyncAnyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted async def main -> None response = await client health check asyncio run main
Functionality between the synchronous and asynchronous clients is otherwise identical.
With aiohttp
By default, the async client uses httpx for HTTP requests. However, for improved concurrency performance you may also use aiohttp as the HTTP backend.
You can enable this by installing aiohttp:
# install from PyPI #
Then you can enable it by instantiating the client with http_client=DefaultAioHttpClient():
import os import asyncio from anyformat import DefaultAioHttpClient from anyformat import AsyncAnyformat async def main -> None async with AsyncAnyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted http_client = DefaultAioHttpClient as client response = await client health check asyncio run main
Using types
Nested request parameters are TypedDicts. Responses are Pydantic models which also provide helper methods for things like:
 Serializing back into JSON, model.to_json()
 Converting to a dictionary, model.to_dict()
Typed requests and responses provide autocomplete and documentation within your editor. If you would like to see type errors in VS Code to help catch bugs earlier, set python.analysis.typeCheckingMode to basic.
Handling errors
When the library is unable to connect to the API (for example, due to network connection problems or a timeout), a subclass of anyformat.APIConnectionError is raised.
When the API returns a non-success status code (that is, 4xx or 5xx response), a subclass of anyformat.APIStatusError is raised, containing status_code and response properties.
All errors inherit from anyformat.APIError.
import anyformat from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat try client health check except anyformat APIConnectionError as e print "The server could not be reached" print e __cause__# an underlying Exception, likely raised within httpx. except anyformat RateLimitError as e print"A 429 status code was received; we should back off a bit." except anyformat APIStatusError as e print"Another non-200-range status code was received" print e status_code print e response
Error codes are as follows:
| Status Code | Error Type |
 --- |
| 400 | BadRequestError |
| 401 | AuthenticationError |
| 403 | PermissionDeniedError |
| 404 | NotFoundError |
| 422 | UnprocessableEntityError |
| 429 | RateLimitError |
| >=500 | InternalServerError |
| N/A | APIConnectionError |
Retries
Certain errors are automatically retried 2 times by default, with a short exponential backoff. Connection errors (for example, due to a network connectivity problem), 408 Request Timeout, 409 Conflict, 429 Rate Limit, and >=500 Internal errors are all retried by default.
You can use the max_retries option to configure or disable retry settings:
from anyformat import Anyformat# Configure the default for all requests: client = Anyformat # default is 2 max_retries = 0# Or, configure per-request: client with_options max_retries = 5 health check
Timeouts
By default requests time out after 1 minute. You can configure this with a timeout option, which accepts a float or an httpx.Timeout object:
from anyformat import Anyformat# Configure the default for all requests: client = Anyformat# 20 seconds (default is 1 minute) timeout =20.0# More granular control: client = Anyformat timeout = httpx Timeout60.0 read =5.0 write =10.0 connect =2.0# Override per-request: client with_options timeout =5.0 health check
On timeout, an APITimeoutError is thrown.
Note that requests that time out are retried twice by default.
Advanced
Logging
We use the standard library logging module.
You can enable logging by setting the environment variable ANYFORMAT_LOG to info.
export
Or to debug for more verbose logging.
How to tell whether None means null or missing
In an API response, a field may be explicitly null, or missing entirely; in either case, its value is None in this library. You can differentiate the two cases with .model_fields_set:
if response my_field is None if 'my_field' not in not in response model_fields_set print'Got json like {}, without a "my_field" key present at all.' else print'Got json like {"my_field": null}.'
Accessing raw response data (e.g. headers)
The "raw" Response object can be accessed by prefixing .with_raw_response. to any HTTP method call, e.g.,
from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat response = client health with_raw_response check print response headers get'X-My-Header' health = response parse# get the object that 
These methods return an [The async client returns an AsyncAPIResponse with the same structure, the only difference being awaitable methods for reading the response content.
.with_streaming_response
The above interface eagerly reads the full response body when you make the request, which may not always be what you want.
To stream the response body, use .with_streaming_response instead, which requires a context manager and only reads the response body once you call .read(), .text(), .json(), .iter_bytes(), .iter_text(), .iter_lines() or .parse(). In the async client, these are async methods.
with client health with_streaming_response check as response print response headers get"X-My-Header" for line in response iter_lines print line
The context manager is required so that the response will reliably be closed.
Making custom/undocumented requests
This library is typed for convenient access to the documented API.
If you need to access undocumented endpoints, params, or response properties, the library can still be used.
Undocumented endpoints
To make requests to undocumented endpoints, you can make requests using client.get, client.post, and other http verbs. Options on the client will be respected (such as retries) when making this request.
import httpx response = client post"/foo" cast_to = httpx Response body = "my_param" True print response headers get"x-foo"
Undocumented request params
If you want to explicitly send an extra param, you can do so with the extra_query, extra_body, and extra_headers request options.
Undocumented response properties
To access undocumented response properties, you can access the extra fields like response.unknown_prop. You can also get all the extra fields on the Pydantic model as a dict with response.model_extra.
Configuring the HTTP client
You can directly override the httpx client to customize it for your use case, including:
 Support for proxies
 Custom transports
 Additional advanced functionality
import httpx from anyformat import Anyformat DefaultHttpxClient client = Anyformat # Or use the 
You can also customize the client on a per-request basis by using client with_options http_client = DefaultHttpxClient
Managing HTTP resources
By default the library closes underlying HTTP connections whenever the client is garbage collected. You can manually close the client using the .close() method if desired, or with a context manager that closes when exiting.
from anyformat import Anyformat with Anyformat as client # make requests here # HTTP client is now closed
Versioning
This package generally follows SemVer conventions, though certain backwards-incompatible changes may be released as minor versions:
1. Changes that only affect static types, without breaking runtime behavior.
2. Changes to library internals which are technically public but not intended or documented for external use. (Please open a GitHub issue to let us know if you are relying on such internals.)
3. Changes that we do not expect to impact the vast majority of users in practice.
We take backwards-compatibility seriously and work hard to ensure you can rely on a smooth upgrade experience.
We are keen for your feedback; please open an issue with questions, bugs, or suggestions.
Determining the installed version
If you've upgraded to the latest version but aren't seeing any new features you were expecting then your python environment is likely still using an older version.
You can determine the version that is being used at runtime with:
import anyformat print anyformat __version__
Python 3.9 or higher.
See the contributing documentation.

How L'Oréal Cut Invoice Processing Time by 60% with 99% Accuracy
L'Oréal's Invoice to Cash team processes over 1,500 commercial invoices every month, relying on a manual workflow that took 38 hours per week. With anyformat, they automated document extraction, validation, and classification, reaching 99% accuracy and significantly reducing operational workload, all without requiring IT resources, enabling a fast and frictionless rollout.
Overview
Reliable Document Data. Built for Production.
anyformat handles the formats, edge cases, and integrations that break traditional pipelines, so your workflows stay reliable as data scales.

Designed to scale
Process high volumes of data with reliable performance, monitoring, and analytics built for production workloads.
Performance metrics dashboard showing scaling capabilities
Built-in validation
Catch errors, handle edge cases, and ensure consistent output with validations and monitoring at every step.
Data validation interface showing error checking and quality monitoring

Build workflows visually
Create and manage parsing, validation, and routing logic using an intuitive workflow editor.
Visual workflow builder showing nodes and connections for document processing
Frequently Asked Questions
Answers to common questions about anyformat and its features. If you have any other questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.
anyformat is an agentic document intelligence platform that extracts, structures, and routes data from any document — automatically. It combines AI models with deterministic rules and no-code workflow orchestration, built for enterprise teams that need production-grade accuracy.
Stop processing documents manually
Book a demo and see how teams cut manual document processing by 5x with anyformat.

Getting Started
Welcome to anyformat
Learn how to turn documents into reliable, structured data, without building fragile pipelines.
anyformat helps you extract, validate, and transform data from any document using AI-powered workflows. This documentation will guide you step by step, from your first file to advanced workflows and automation. Whether you’re here to:
 Process invoices or IDs
 Build reliable document workflows
 Improve accuracy
 Or just understand how anyformat works [...] anyformat is a document processing platform that lets you:
 Upload documents (PDFs, images, scans)
 Extract structured data using AI
 Validate and refine results
 Output clean data you can actually use
You don’t need to be technical. You don’t need to write code. You do need documents and a problem to solve. 
​ What can I do with anyformat?
With anyformat, you can:
 Extract data from invoices, receipts, IDs, contracts, and more
 Handle unstructured or messy documents
 Standardize data across different formats
 Build repeatable workflows for document processing
 Validate and improve quality over time
 Export structured data to your systems
All without managing OCR engines, brittle rules, or manual review processes. 
​ How anyformat works
At a simple level, anyformat works like this:
1 [...] At a simple level, anyformat works like this:

Upload a file
anyformat reads the document and understands its structure.
2
Define what you want
You describe the data you need using fields and instructions.
3
Refine & validate
Review results, fix mistakes, and improve accuracy.
4
Run at scale
Apply the same logic to thousands of documents.
5
Use the output
Export clean, structured data in formats your tools understand.
You can keep things simple, or go deeper as your needs grow. 
​ Key concepts you’ll learn here

 Files - The documents you upload
 Schemas - The structure of the data you want
 Fields - Individual pieces of information (date, amount, name…)
 Workflows - Repeatable processes to extract and validate data

 Getting Started

Getting Started
Welcome to anyformat
Learn how to turn documents into reliable, structured data, without building fragile pipelines.
anyformat helps you extract, validate, and transform data from any document using AI-powered workflows. This documentation will guide you step by step, from your first file to advanced workflows and automation. Whether you’re here to:
 Process invoices or IDs
 Build reliable document workflows
 Improve accuracy
 Or just understand how anyformat works
you’re in the right place. 
​ Get started quickly
Choose how you want to begin. You don’t need to read everything.
Files & Documents
Start here if you want to upload a document and see results fast.Learn how files work, how pages are handled, and how usage is counted.
Workflow Quickstart
Best starting point for most users.Learn how to create a workflow, define fields, and extract structured data.
Data & Structure
Understand the building blocks.Learn how to define schemas, fields, and instructions for your workflows.
API Quickstart
For developers and technical teams.Learn how to integrate anyformat programmatically.
​ What is anyformat?
anyformat is a document processing platform that lets you:
 Upload documents (PDFs, images, scans)
 Extract structured data using AI
 Validate and refine results
 Output clean data you can actually use
You don’t need to be technical. You don’t need to write code. You do need documents and a problem to solve. 
​ What can I do with anyformat?
With anyformat, you can:
 Extract data from invoices, receipts, IDs, contracts, and more
 Handle unstructured or messy documents
 Standardize data across different formats
 Build repeatable workflows for document processing
 Validate and improve quality over time
 Export structured data to your systems
All without managing OCR engines, brittle rules, or manual review processes. 
​ How anyformat works
At a simple level, anyformat works like this:
1
Upload a file
anyformat reads the document and understands its structure.
2
Define what you want
You describe the data you need using fields and instructions.
3
Refine & validate
Review results, fix mistakes, and improve accuracy.
4
Run at scale
Apply the same logic to thousands of documents.
5
Use the output
Export clean, structured data in formats your tools understand.
You can keep things simple, or go deeper as your needs grow. 
​ Key concepts you’ll learn here
Before diving in, it helps to understand a few core ideas:
 Files - The documents you upload
 Schemas - The structure of the data you want
 Fields - Individual pieces of information (date, amount, name…)
 Workflows - Repeatable processes to extract and validate data
 Outputs - The structured results you use elsewhere
Don’t worry, we’ll explain each one step by step. 
​ How to use this documentation
This documentation is designed as a learning path:
 New to anyformat? Start with Core Concepts.
 Already using the product? Jump directly to Workflows.
 Looking for power features? Check out the advanced sections.
You don’t need to read everything, just what helps you move forward. 
​ Explore more
Core Concepts
Understand the fundamentals of document processing
Outputs
Learn about structured results and export formats
Data and Structure
Define schemas and fields for your workflows
API Reference
Integrate anyformat into your applications

Anyformat - overview
Established
2024
Location
Madrid, -, Spain
Primary Industry
Software
About
Established in 2024 and based in Madrid, Spain, Anyformat focuses on document processing technologies. Alejandro Fernandez Rodriguez (COO), Juan Huguet Garcia (CEO), and Diego Perez Sastre (CTO) are the co-founders of the company. In November 2025, Anyformat raised EUR 3. 3 million in seed funding led by new investor Kibo Ventures, with participation from another new investor Decelera Ventures.
Returning investors 4Founders Capital and Abac Capital also participated in the round.
Anyformat specializes in advanced data extraction and structuring solutions, enabling organizations to derive insights from various document formats, including emails, PDFs, scans, reports, and audio recordings. The company’s core offering utilizes proprietary in-house models optimized for specific use cases, allowing for automated extraction of complex and heterogeneous documents without the risk of hallucination. This technology is particularly beneficial for industries requiring the processing of lengthy documents, such as financial services, healthcare, and insurance.
Anyformat serves a diverse client base, including leading companies across multiple sectors, who leverage the service to streamline processes such as data reconciliation, regulatory compliance, and customer relationship management. The products are deployed in private cloud or on-premises environments, ensuring data security and privacy while being utilized in global markets.
The revenue model of Anyformat is centered around B2B transactions, where enterprises engage the company’s services through subscription-based agreements or tailored partnerships.
The company plans to utilize the November 2025 funding to grow its engineering and product teams, which will help advance its roadmap for enhanced extraction features and the creation of unique error detection models.

supporting_evidence.title: AI Document Processing & Workflow Automation | anyformat
supporting_evidence.snippet:
L'Oréal's Invoice to Cash team processes over 1,500 commercial invoices every month, relying on a manual workflow that took 38 hours per week. With anyformat, they automated document extraction, validation, and classification, reaching 99% accuracy and significantly reducing operational workload, all without requiring IT resources, enabling a fast and frictionless rollout.
Overview
Reliable Document Data. Built for Production.
anyformat handles the formats, edge cases, and integrations that break traditional pipelines, so your workflows stay reliable as data scales.

Multiple document format icons including PDF, DOC, and images

Anyformat - overview
Established
2024
Location
Madrid, -, Spain
Primary Industry
Software
About
Established in 2024 and based in Madrid, Spain, Anyformat focuses on document processing technologies. Alejandro Fernandez Rodriguez (COO), Juan Huguet Garcia (CEO), and Diego Perez Sastre (CTO) are the co-founders of the company. In November 2025, Anyformat raised EUR 3. 3 million in seed funding led by new investor Kibo Ventures, with participation from another new investor Decelera Ventures.
Returning investors 4Founders Capital and Abac Capital also participated in the round.
Anyformat specializes in advanced data extraction and structuring solutions, enabling organizations to derive insights from various document formats, including emails, PDFs, scans, reports, and audio recordings. The company’s core offering utilizes proprietary in-house models optimized for specific use cases, allowing for automated extraction of complex and heterogeneous documents without the risk of hallucination. This technology is particularly beneficial for industries requiring the processing of lengthy documents, such as financial services, healthcare, and insurance.
Anyformat serves a diverse client base, including leading companies across multiple sectors, who leverage the service to streamline processes such as data reconciliation, regulatory compliance, and customer relationship management. The products are deployed in private cloud or on-premises environments, ensuring data security and privacy while being utilized in global markets.
The revenue model of Anyformat is centered around B2B transactions, where enterprises engage the company’s services through subscription-based agreements or tailored partnerships.
The company plans to utilize the November 2025 funding to grow its engineering and product teams, which will help advance its roadmap for enhanced extraction features and the creation of unique error detection models.

HomeFundingMadrid's Anyformat closes €3.3 million round to scale its agentic OCR and...
FundingSpain-Startups
Madrid’s Anyformat closes €3.3 million round to scale its agentic OCR and data-sovereignty-focused document tools
Image 8: David Cendon Garcia
ByDavid Cendon Garcia
November 27, 2025
Share
FacebookTwitterWhatsAppLinkedin

Image 9: Anyformat
Anyformat, a Spanish GenAI platform specialising in extracting and structuring complex data from any document, has closed a Seed round of €3.3 million to expand the engineering and product team, driving its roadmap in advanced extraction capabilities and the development of proprietary error detection models.
The round was led by Kibo Ventures and followed by 4Founders, Abac Nest Ventures and Decelera Ventures, funds that already participated in the previous round.
Juan Huguet, CEO and co-founder of Anyformat, says, “_Documents are the backbone of any organisation. Our goal is to enable companies to analyse them with human intelligence, machine speed and the security required by regulation. We are building the new European document infrastructure.‘_(Translated).
Among European startups working on document processing, data extraction and AI-enabled enterprise automation, 2025 funding activity has been limited but illustrative: France-based Klaimy raised €1.2 million to advance its AI assistant for processing medical documentation, while Prague-headquartered Resistant AI secured €21 million in Series B financing to strengthen its document-fraud detection and financial-crime prevention systems.
Together, these comparable 2025 rounds amount to roughly €22.2 million, indicating that investor attention in this domain remains focused on specialised applications such as insurance, medical underwriting and fraud detection rather than broad, general-purpose document-infrastructure platforms.
In this context, Anyformat’s €3.3 million Seed roundpositions it as one of the few European companies pursuing a horizontal, generative-AI-based document-intelligence layer – particularly notable given the absence of other Spain-based fundraises in the category – adding meaningful weight to the still-emerging European document-automation landscape.
Diego Pérez, co-founder and CTO of the company, adds:_“We are developing technology that goes far beyond document digitisation_.” (Translated)
Founded in 2024, Anyformat is innovating a new generation of document infrastructure based on generative AI, which reportedly allows the operational teams of large corporations to work with complex documents with human precision and machine speed, while maintaining control of the data at all times.
Since its previous round, where it raised €520k in pre-Seed funding (as covered by EU-Startups), Anyformat has expanded its offering beyond classic extraction. Today, the company says they are the only provider that allows the information extracted from a document to be combined in real time with internal and proprietary company data.
This means that a contract, invoice or email can be analysed automatically while being cross-referenced directly with corporate databases, such as customers, policies, catalogues or history.
For organisations with complex documentation and fragmented systems, this capability eliminates manual validations, reduces errors and accelerates critical business processes.
This represents a real problem: according to Dell Technologies’ Innovation Catalyst report, 68% of Spanish companies are unable to convert their data into valuable information in real time.
“_The document intelligence market is entering a new phase driven by generative AI and agentic systems. Anyformat has developed a unique technology that allows companies to automate critical processes while maintaining data sovereignty, a key issue in Europe._
_“The vision and talent of the founders, whom we know from their time at Clarity.ai, a company also invested in by Kibo Ventures, combined with the possibilities offered by AI in a huge market, were key factors in our decision to invest_,” shares Javier Torremocha, co-founder and Managing Partner of Kibo Ventures.
Anyformat aims to exceed €1 million in ARR in 2026, supported by its commercial expansion in Europe and the increase in use cases linked to automation, compliance and advanced document processing.
In addition, the company will continue to invest in its privacy-first infrastructure, strengthening security processes and advancing certifications such as ISO 27001.
The company is positioning its Agentic OCR as the new standard for automating critical processes in organisations that cannot compromise on accuracy or data control.

anyformat Release 0.0.2
Release 0.0.2  0.0.2
The official Python library for the anyformat API
Homepage PyPI Python
License
:   Apache-2.0
Install
:   pip install anyformat==0.0.2
Documentation
Anyformat Python API library
The Anyformat Python library provides convenient access to the Anyformat REST API from any Python 3.9+ application. The library includes type definitions for all request params and response fields, and offers both synchronous and asynchronous clients powered by httpx.
It is generated with Stainless.
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
Installation
# install from PyPI #
Usage
The full API of this library can be found in api.md. [...] Usage
The full API of this library can be found in api.md.
import os from anyformat import Anyformat client = Anyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted response = client health check
While you can provide an api_key keyword argument, we recommend using python-dotenv to add ANYFORMAT_API_KEY="My API Key" to your .env file so that your API Key is not stored in source control.
Async usage
Simply import AsyncAnyformat instead of Anyformat and use await with each API call:
import os import asyncio from anyformat import AsyncAnyformat client = AsyncAnyformat api_key = os environ get "ANYFORMAT_API_KEY" # This is the default and can be omitted async def main -> None response = await client health check asyncio run main [...] 3. Changes that we do not expect to impact the vast majority of users in practice.
We take backwards-compatibility seriously and work hard to ensure you can rely on a smooth upgrade experience.
We are keen for your feedback; please open an issue with questions, bugs, or suggestions.
Determining the installed version
If you've upgraded to the latest version but aren't seeing any new features you were expecting then your python environment is likely still using an older version.
You can determine the version that is being used at runtime with:
import anyformat print anyformat __version__
Python 3.9 or higher.
See the contributing documentation.
